title: CC:VSR
description: A ValkyrienSkies API for CC: Tweaked
body:
CCVSR is a ComputerCraft Tweaked addon for getting information from ValkyrienSkies ships.

It's made after the mod CCVS but with a different take on the information access and the librairies given such as the quaternion and ship built-in librairies

A wiki is accessible for understanding and using the different methods provided at the [github wiki](https://github.com/crocblancyt/CC-VS-Revamped/wiki)
